problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation may resolve Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
